name: golang-github-cyphar-filepath-securejoin-dev
title: golang-github-cyphar-filepath-securejoin-dev
description:
filepath.SecureJoin implementation
An implementation of SecureJoin, a candidate for inclusion in the Go
standard library (https://github.com/golang/go/issues/20126). The purpose
of this function is to be a "secure" alternative to filepath.Join, and in
particular it provides certain guarantees that are not provided by
filepath.Join.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-cyphar-filepath-securejoin-dev because filepath.SecureJoin implementation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-cyphar-filepath-securejoin-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-cyphar-filepath-securejoin-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-cyphar-filepath-securejoin-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
